title: Check-in Counter
scene: 你到达机场，准备办理登机手续。

turns.cn: 您好，请出示护照和机票。
turns.en: Good morning. May I see your passport and ticket, please?

turns.cn: 给您。我想靠窗的座位。
turns.en: Here you go. I'd like a window seat, please.

turns.cn: 好的，12A。您有行李要托运吗？
turns.en: Sure, that's 12A. Do you have any bags to check?

turns.cn: 有一个行李箱。
turns.en: Yes, just one suitcase.

turns.cn: 请把行李放到传送带上。
turns.en: Please place your bag on the conveyor belt.

turns.cn: 这是您的登机牌，登机口是B7。
turns.en: Here's your boarding pass. Your gate is B7.

turns.cn: 几点开始登机？
turns.en: What time does boarding start?

turns.cn: 下午两点三十分，祝您旅途愉快！
turns.en: Boarding begins at 2:30 PM. Have a great flight!

turns.cn: 请把笔记本电脑从包里拿出来。
turns.en: Please take your laptop out of your bag.

turns.cn: 好的，需要脱鞋吗？
turns.en: Sure. Do I need to take off my shoes?

turns.cn: 是的，请把外套也脱掉。
turns.en: Yes, and please remove your jacket as well.

turns.cn: 我口袋里有一瓶水。
turns.en: I have a water bottle in my pocket.

turns.cn: 液体不能过安检，请倒掉或扔掉。
turns.en: Liquids aren't allowed. Please empty it or throw it away.

turns.cn: 好的，我这就倒掉。
turns.en: Okay, I'll empty it right now.

turns.cn: 请走过安检门。
turns.en: Please walk through the scanner.

turns.cn: 没问题，祝您旅途愉快。
turns.en: You're all set. Have a nice trip.

title: Asking for Directions
scene: 你在机场转机，找不到登机口。

turns.cn: 打扰一下，去C12登机口怎么走？
turns.en: Excuse me, how do I get to gate C12?

turns.cn: 坐扶梯上到二楼，然后左转。
turns.en: Take the escalator up to the second floor, then turn left.

turns.cn: 大概要走多久？
turns.en: How long does it take to get there?

turns.cn: 大约十分钟，你的航班几点？
turns.en: About ten minutes. What time is your flight?

turns.cn: 三点起飞，现在两点半了。
turns.en: It departs at three. It's two thirty now.

turns.cn: 那你得赶快了！
turns.en: Then you'd better hurry!

turns.cn: 谢谢你的帮助！
turns.en: Thanks for your help!

title: Delayed Flight
scene: 你的航班延误了，去柜台咨询。

turns.cn: 请问，341航班为什么延误了？
turns.en: Excuse me, why is flight 341 delayed?

turns.cn: 因为天气原因，预计延误两小时。
turns.en: Due to weather, it's expected to be about two hours late.

turns.cn: 我会错过转机，能改签吗？
turns.en: I'll miss my connection. Can I rebook?

turns.cn: 可以，我帮您查下一班。
turns.en: Sure, let me look for the next available flight.

turns.cn: 今晚八点有一班，要换吗？
turns.en: There's one at eight tonight. Would you like that?

turns.cn: 好的，麻烦您了。有餐券吗？
turns.en: Yes, please. Do you offer meal vouchers?

turns.cn: 有的，这是您的改签登机牌和十五美元餐券。
turns.en: Yes. Here's your new boarding pass and a fifteen-dollar meal voucher.

title: Lost Luggage
scene: 到达后发现自己的行李箱没有出来。

turns.cn: 你好，我的行李没有出来。
turns.en: Hi, my luggage didn't come out on the carousel.

turns.cn: 请出示您的行李票和登机牌。
turns.en: May I see your baggage claim tag and boarding pass?

turns.cn: 在这里。是一个黑色的拉杆箱。
turns.en: Here they are. It's a black rolling suitcase.

turns.cn: 我查一下系统……您的行李还在出发站。
turns.en: Let me check the system. Your bag is still at the departure airport.

turns.cn: 什么时候能送到？
turns.en: When will it be delivered?

turns.cn: 明天下午前会送到您登记的地址。
turns.en: It should arrive at your address by tomorrow afternoon.

turns.cn: 好的，这是我的酒店地址和电话。
turns.en: Okay. Here's my hotel address and phone number.

title: Flight Delay
scene: 登机口广播航班延误，你向地勤询问改签。

turns.cn: 各位旅客，本次航班延误两小时。
turns.en: Attention passengers, this flight is delayed two hours.

turns.cn: 我会错过转机，能改签到更早的航班吗？
turns.en: I'll miss my connection. Can I switch to an earlier flight?

turns.cn: 请出示登机牌，我查一下可选航班。
turns.en: May I see your boarding pass? I'll check available flights.

turns.cn: 如果今天走不了，酒店谁负责？
turns.en: If I can't leave today, who covers the hotel?

turns.cn: 航司原因延误，我们可以安排住宿券。
turns.en: For airline-caused delays, we can issue a hotel voucher.

turns.cn: 行李需要重新托运吗？
turns.en: Do I need to recheck my luggage?

turns.cn: 不用，行李会直挂，新登机口稍后广播。
turns.en: No, bags stay checked through. The new gate will be announced.
